summary_en: 561,000 shares acquired on May 22, 2026 for ¥125.1M via ToSTNeT-3. Cumulative to date: 2,618,000 shares (8.53% of 4.1M authorized limit, 1.83% of shares outstanding) for ¥591.3M (72.1% of ¥820M limit). Program window: Jan 30–Dec 11, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Results of Acquisition of Treasury Stock via Off-Market Purchase Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
MBK Co., Ltd. reported on May 22, 2026 the results of a single transaction executed the same day under its authorized share buyback program. The company acquired 561,000 shares (1.83% of outstanding shares) for ¥125.1M via ToSTNeT-3 (off-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange).

Cumulatively from the program's January 30, 2026 start through May 22, the company has acquired 2,618,000 shares (8.53% of the 4.1M-share limit authorized by board resolutions on December 12, 2025 and May 18, 2026) for ¥591.3M (72.1% of the ¥820M upper limit). The buyback window runs through December 11, 2026.
